channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS

item.title:
Added these drone prongs that are in front of many Ukrainian drones, and on touch they blow up
They...
item.description:
Added these drone prongs that are in front of many Ukrainian drones, and on touch they blow up
They're very precise and I tested it a lot so you can fly inside buildings carefully but the moment you touch the wall 💥 BOOM
Also added a proximity sound like peep peep peep PEEPPPPPPP
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 8 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 1908
item.author: @levelsio
